basic_details.job_title: ECHS Jharkhand Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Medical, Para Medical & Non Medical Staff Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Jharkhand (ECHS Jharkhand)
basic_details.post_name: Medical, Para Medical & Non Medical Staff
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Jharkhand has released the official Medical, Para Medical & Non Medical Staff Recruitment 2026 at its official website. A total of 21 vacancies have been announced under the ECHS Jharkhand Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 68 years (varies by post) and possessing qualifications ranging from 8th pass to Graduation with relevant experience can submit their offline applications on or before 04 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Varies by post, up to 68 years.
age_limit.details: OIC Polyclinic: Maximum age 63 years. Med Specialist: Maximum age 68 years. Med Offr: Maximum age 66 years. IT Net WkTech: Maximum age 56 years. Lab Tech: Maximum age 56 years. Dental Hygienist Dental Assistant: Maximum age 56 years. Nursing Assistant: Maximum age 56 years. Pharmacist: Maximum age 56 years. DEO/CIK: Maximum age 53 years. Cik: Maximum age 53 years. DEO: Maximum age 53 years. Driver: Maximum age 53 years. Female Attendant: Maximum age 53 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Various qualifications from Graduate to 8th Class with relevant experience.
qualification.details: OIC Polyclinic: Graduate with a minimum of 05 years of work experience in Health Care Institutions or Managerial positions. Med Specialist: MD/MS in the concerned specialty or DNB with a minimum of 03 years of experience in the specialty after post-graduation. Med Offr: MBBS with a minimum of 03 years of work experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in medicine/surgery. IT Net WkTech: Diploma or Certificate equivalent in IT Networking or Computer application with a minimum of two years of work experience. Lab Tech: B.Sc in Medical Lab Technology OR Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from a recognized institution/board AND a Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a recognized institution. Minimum 03 years of experience as a Lab Assistant in a Medical Lab. Dental Hygienist Dental Assistant: Diploma Holder in Dental Hygienist/Class-1DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of work experience in a Dental Laboratory. Nursing Assistant: GNM Diploma/CI-1 Nursing Assistants Course (Armed Forces) with a minimum of 05 years of work experience. Pharmacist: B Pharmacy & Diploma in Pharmacy, with computer working knowledge. Science with Physics, Chemistry & Biology. Minimum 3 years of work experience. DEO/CIK: Graduate or Class-1 clerical trade (Armed forces) with a minimum of 5 years of work experience. Cik: Graduate or Class-1 clerical trade (Armed forces) with a minimum of 5 years of work experience. DEO: Graduate or Class-1 clerical trade (Armed forces) with a minimum of 5 years of work experience. Driver: 8th Class pass, MT driver (Armed forces), possess a civil driving license, and a minimum of 5 years of work experience as a Driver. Female Attendant: Literate with a minimum of 5 years of work experience in Civil/Army Health institutions.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Jharkhand Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ECHS Jharkhand Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Jharkhand recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS Jharkhand recruitment is 04 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Medical, Para Medical & Non Medical Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 vacancies available for the Medical, Para Medical & Non Medical Staff posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Driver post is 8th Class pass, along with a civil driving license and relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Med Specialist post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Med Specialist post is 68 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 21,800/-pm to Rs. 1,30,000/-pm, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be posted in Ranchi, Daltonganj, Chaibasa, and Gumla.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for ECHS Jharkhand recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for ECHS Jharkhand?
faq.answer: The official website for ECHS Jharkhand is www.echs.gov.in.
